calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2015 Off Calendar

Plaintiff University Of Pennsylvanias Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment In Favor Of Plaintiff And Against Defendant Sarah E. Goldin
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Philip T. Kilduff, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, UNIVERITY OF PENNSYLVANIA.
Matthew A. Cebrian of Jones & Devory, LLP, attorney for Defendant Sarah E. Goldin, present in court.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SARAH E. GOLDIN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $10,027.75
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,090.52
Attorney's Fees: $4,483.50
Costs: $434.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $15,915.77
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Continued To Jun-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
